title: Green Windswept Savanna
description: Changes windswept savanna grass & foliage color to green like in old Bedrock versions
body:
## Green Windswept Savanna
**NOTE: This pack requires Polytone to work**
A resource pack that changes the grass and foliage color in windswept savannas to a vibrant green like in older versions of Bedrock Edition. (before 1.19.40)

Please note that this pack **only changes the grass and foliage color**, so there's no rain, like in vanilla.
